kirundi.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) yateguye harmony ya bebop mu buryo. Uburyo bwe bukoresha 6th chords aho gukoresha 7ths kandi bwongeraho diminished passing chords hagati y'ibyiciro bya scale kugira ngo ijwi riyoborwe neza.
kirundi.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: igihe cyo kugera kuri volume yuzuye. Decay: igihe cyo kumanuka kugera sustain. Sustain: urwego rwa volume rukomeza. Release: igihe cyo kuzima nyuma yo kurekura key.
kirundi.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale ni itsinda rya pitches ryateguwe. Modes ni ukuzunguruka kwa scale gutangira ku byiciro bitandukanye. Buri kimwe gishyiraho imyumvire itandukanye.
kirundi.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Chords zubakwa mu gutuma intervals (3rds) zikurikirana. Major ikoresha major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor irazihindura. Extended chords zongeraho 7ths, 9ths, n'ibirenga.
kirundi.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks zikoresha sine oscillator ifite pitch sweep. Snares zivanga noise (yasukuwe) + tone body. Hi-hats zikoresha high-pass filtered noise bursts.
kirundi.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = quarter-note beats 4 kuri buri bar (isanzwe cane). 3/4 = imyumvire ya waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 na 7/8 bikora grooves zidahwitse, z'amahanga.
kirundi.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Keys zategujwe na 5ths zizamuka mu cerekezo cy'isaha. Keys ziturana zisangira 6 muri 7 z'amanota. Kujya mu cerekezo cy'isaha byongera sharps; mu cerekezo kinyuranye byongera flats.
kirundi.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Buri jwi ry'umuziki rifite overtones hejuru ya fundamental. Imbaraga zabo bijyanye zigena timbre — ni yo mpamvu trumpet ivuga itandukanye na flute kuri pitch imwe.
kirundi.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval ni intera hagati ya pitches ebyiri, ipimwa muri semitones. Frequency ratio igena consonance (ratios zoroshye nka 3:2 zumvikana neza).
kirundi.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Ikina amanota ya chord rimwe rimwe mu murongo. Hejuru = kuva hasi kugera hejuru, Hasi = kuva hejuru kugera hasi. Ikora patterns zitemba ziva kuri chords zihamye.
kirundi.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter ikuraho frequencies ziri hejuru (lowpass), hasi (highpass), canke hafi (bandpass) ya cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) yongera frequencies hafi ya cutoff, ikora peak.
kirundi.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: impinduka za volume z'igihe n'igihe (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: impinduka za pitch z'igihe n'igihe (frequency modulation). Byombi bigenzurwa na LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
kirundi.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Byavumbuwe mu 1983. Noise burst yinjira muri delay line ngufi cane ifite feedback. Delay time igena pitch. Filter iri muri feedback loop igenzura urumuri na decay. Isa na plucked strings mu buryo busanzwe.
kirundi.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer ni igikoresho cyo guhanga. Buri step igereranya subdivision ya beat. Umurongo wa melody ushyiraho pitched notes, drums zongeraho rythme. Musical notation yerekana ibyo ukora.
kirundi.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Amanota ari ku mirongo n'umwanya agereranya pitches. Igihe kigaragazwa n'imiterere y'inota: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff ifite imirongo 5.
kirundi.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: amanota 12 kuri octave, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier ya Bach (1722) yemeje isi kuri iyi masezerano. Buri nota ukina hano iri kuri grid iyo.
kirundi.scales_the_major_minor_modal_grammar: Scales — imiterere ya major + minor + modal
kirundi.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) ziva mu kuzunguruka interval pattern ya major scale.
kirundi.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords zongeraho third indi. Umuziki pop = ~chords 6 zisubiramo; jazz ikoresha extensions na substitutions.
kirundi.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — igitanda kiri munsi ya hafi buri cinematic score. Gerageza iv-V-i muri minor, canke i-VI-VII ku myumvire ya Hans Zimmer. Drones muri fifths zishyigikira umuziki gakondo w'Ubuhinde n'imigenzo ya bagpipe.
kirundi.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Umuziki mwinshi uzwi uri kuri 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (imyumvire ya half-time). Kick kuri 1+3, snare kuri 2+4 = backbeat — urufatiro rwa rock + pop.
kirundi.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) yavumbuye consonance uva muri integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz yabyaguye mu 1862. Ijwi = compression waves; umuziki = patterns twemeye kwita nziza.
kirundi.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid yuzuye, strum plate, na voice presets
kirundi.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Kurura ku strings kugira ngo ukore strum!
kirundi.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis ikoresha oscillator imwe (modulator) guhindura frequency y'indi (carrier) vuba. Ratio ya modulator:carrier igena harmonic content. Ratios zoroshye (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) zikora harmonic tones. Ratios zigoye zikora metallic, bell-like, canke inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 yamamaje FM mu 1983.
kirundi.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw iteranya sawtooth oscillators nyinshi zadetunwe gato kuva ku zindi. Ibi bikora ijwi rinini, ryagutse, ririmurika — ikimenyetso cya EDM, trance, na pop igezweho. Voices nyinshi = rikomeye ariko rikoresha CPU nyinshi. Detuning igenzura uko voices zitanura mu tuning — detune nyinshi = ryagutse/nka chorus, gato = rikomeye/ryibanze.
kirundi.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator ikina amanota ya chord rimwe rimwe mu murongo. "Hejuru" ijya kuva hasi kugera hejuru, ikora ingufu zizamuka. "Hasi" imanuka ku myumvire y'isumo. Umuvuduko ugenzura umuvuduko (gato = vuba). Gate igenzura igihe buri nota rimara rivuza (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Gerageza umuvuduko=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern kuri classic trance arp!
kirundi.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Ririmba, vuga, canke ukine igikoresho — umva effects ako kanya!
kirundi.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Ikuraho frequencies ziri hejuru (lowpass) canke hasi (highpass) ya threshold. Nko gupfuka umunwa n'ukuboko — frequencies zo hejuru zirazimira, ijwi rihinduka "ryijimye" cane.
kirundi.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Ikora echoes mu gukoporora signal no kuyisubiramo nyuma y'igihe gito. Feedback igenzura umubare wa echoes zisubiramo.
kirundi.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Isa na acoustics y'icyumba mu gukora echoes ntoya ibihumbi zivanga. Icyumba gito = reverb ngufi, katedrali = reverb ndende.
kirundi.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Ikata peaks za waveform, ihindura sine waves zoroheje mu miterere ikomeye, ifite inguni. Ibi byongeraho harmonics nshya zitari mu ijwi ry'umwimerere.
kirundi.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Ikoporora signal na delay ntoya ihinduka buri gihe. Ibi bisa na voices/ibikoresho byinshi bikina hamwe bidahuye gato.
kirundi.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Ihindura volume hejuru na hasi vuba, ikora effet itera. Isanzwe muri guitar surf n'umuziki wa organ.
kirundi.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Koresha headphones mu gihe cyo kumonitoringa kugira ngo wirinde feedback loops! Mic inyura muri effects zose zo hejuru (filter, delay, reverb, n'ibindi) — zigenge kugira ngo wumve uko buri imwe ihindura ijwi canke igikoresho cyawe.
kirundi.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Huza microphone yawe kugira ngo ijwi canke igikoresho cyawe kinyure muri effects chain ako kanya.
kirundi.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Reba ijwi ryawe nka waveform + frequency spectrum. Umva uko filter, delay, reverb, distortion, na chorus bihindura sound waves mu buryo bw'umubiri.
kirundi.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Kora & kurura — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
kirundi.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad ishyira ahantu h'urutoki/imbeba yawe ku musical parameters ako kanya. X axis igenzura pitch (ibumoso = hasi, iburyo = hejuru). Y axis igenzura filter cutoff frequency (hejuru = urumuri, hasi = ryijimye). Ibi bisa n'ibikoresho nka Korg Kaoss Pad, cyahinduye live electronic music performance mu guhindura 2D gestures mu ijwi.
kirundi.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Ibumoso–iburyo ni pitch, hejuru–hasi ni filter brightness. Koresha arrow keys kugira ngo ugende ukine nota; kanda Escape canke Space kugira ngo uhagarare.
kirundi.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & ibindi →
kirundi.tap_pads_to_place_beats: Kora pads kugira ngo ushyireho beats
kirundi.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Kanda cells kugira ngo ushyireho amanota — visual melody editor
kirundi.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions zisanzwe — kanda kugira ngo wumve
kirundi.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions zikora ingendo z'amarangamutima. Chord I (tonic) yumvikana nk' 'urugo.' Chord V (dominant) ikora umuvundo ushaka gukemuka ugarutse kuri I. Chord vi (relative minor) yongeraho agahinda canke ubujyakuzimu. Chord IV (subdominant) yimuka ku rugo buhoro. Bikekwa ko progression I-V-vi-IV igaragara mu birenga 70% by'indirimbo za pop kubera ko iringaniza aya marangamutima neza.
kirundi.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Imibare y'Abaroma (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) igereranya ibyiciro bya scale. Inyuguti nini = major chord. Inyuguti nto = minor chord.
kirundi.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Ongeraho melody notes muri grid yo hejuru ↑
kirundi.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Kanda melody cells muri grid yo hejuru kugira ngo urebe notation hano
kirundi.held_for_half_a_bar: Rifashwe kuri kimwe cya kabiri cya bar
kirundi.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Kanda "Nsaba ikizamini!" kugira ngo umenyere rhythm patterns
kirundi.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Ohereza WAV/MP3 files za custom pads. Samples zisibwa iyo urupapuro rusubukuwe.
kirundi.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Kora drum pattern muri grid yo hejuru, hanyuma ukande "+ Ongeraho Iriho nka Section" kugira ngo utangire kubaka indirimbo.
kirundi.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
kirundi.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Nta beats zabitswe. Kora pattern hanyuma ukande Bika!
kirundi.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad ikora warm, tones zisukuye mu kuvanga sine na triangle waves. Hitamo voice, fata chord muri grid yo hasi, hanyuma strum plate!
kirundi.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — kora kugira ngo uhitemo, Space kugira ngo ukore strum
kirundi.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — kora canke kurura hejuru
kirundi.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Umva, reba waveform, kandi wige inkuru ya buri gikoresho
kirundi.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Uku ni ko ibikoresho bitandukanye bibona ijwi ryabo ryihariye! Flute ni ahanini harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinet ifite odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin ifite zose. Kanda kugira ngo wubake timbre yawe!
kirundi.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis ikora ijwi nyaryo rya plucked string ikoresheje noise burst ngufi yoherejwe muri delay line ifite filtered feedback. Genzura brightness (ibara rya noise ry'ibanze) na damping (uburebure bwa sustain) kugira ngo ukore imiterere ya string.
kirundi.what_type_of_chord_do_you_hear: Ni ubuhe bwoko bwa chord wumva?
kirundi.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Menya buri nota muri melody y'amanota 4:
kirundi.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental iremereye, highs zoroheje. Nka acoustic.
kirundi.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mid iremereye idafite fundamental — nk'igiti/cuckoo flute.
kirundi.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Hafi pure fundamental — rifunze / nka sub.
kirundi.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics hafi zingana — ruzuye / timbre nyayo.
kirundi.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Genzura urwego rwa harmonic rwa fundamental, mid, na high. Widget ishyira ijwi mu bwoko bumwe muri timbre eshanu zitandukanye. Nta score, nta gushyira ahagaragara — gusa sweep hanyuma witegereze.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Igitekerezo (inyandiko yigenga): Ni urwego rwa harmonic uruhe rugena "urumuri" na "warm"?
kirundi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Fata sliders ebyiri zikomeye. Nyeganyeza imwe. Witegereze.
kirundi.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Rondera settings ebyiri zikora timbre imwe. Ni izihe proportions basangira?
kirundi.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Ibikoresho nyabyo bifite spectra ziranga. Genzura impamvu flute ivuga itandukanye na violin.
kirundi.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Sobanura uko harmonic content igena imyumvire ya timbre.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: timbre marker y'ibyiciro 5 bitandukanye; nta acoustic fidelity score; nta gushyira ahagaragara — ku bushake.
kirundi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: hakoreshejwe amagambo yoroshye ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi, nta jargon
kirundi.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: ku munyeshure w'umwaka wa 5, mu magambo make kandi mu bucuti
kirundi.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: ku munyeshure usanzwe azi bimwe muri music theory
kirundi.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Kanda "Sobanura" kugira ngo AI tutor asobanure icyo iyi view yigisha ku rwego rwo gusoma wahisemo.
kirundi.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Impamvu ibikoresho bivuga bitandukanye
